question_en: What is the central question in this unit?
choices_en: Whether money is digital or analog
Whether scarcity and settlement still depend on centralized trust
Whether all payment apps are useful
choices_ko: 희소성과 정산이 여전히 중앙집중적 신뢰에 의존하는지
explanation_en: The key issue is whether digital money still relies on centralized trust bottlenecks.
explanation_ko: 핵심 쟁점은 디지털 화폐가 여전히 중앙집중적 신뢰 병목에 의존하는지 여부다.
